title: RGMCET Official Contact Details
content: Rajeev Gandhi Memorial College of Engineering and Technology (RGMCET) is located at Nerawada X Roads, Nandyal – 518501, Andhra Pradesh, India. Official email contacts include principal.9@jntua.ac.in and principal@rgmcet.edu.in. The main phone numbers are +91-9866308422, +91-9866308423, and 08514-275203. Fax number: 08514-275123.
